allow: Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'echo "--- which ---"; which node; which npm; echo "--- versions ---"; node -v; npm -v; echo "--- PATH ---"; echo $PATH | tr ":" "\\n"')

Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \\. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm ls; echo "--- installing node 20 ---"; nvm install 20; nvm alias default 20; echo "--- verify ---"; which node; node -v; which npm; npm -v')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'ls -la $HOME/.nvm/ 2>&1 | head -20; echo "---"; cat $HOME/.bashrc | grep -A3 NVM_DIR')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'ls -la $HOME/.nvm/*.sh 2>&1; echo "---full listing---"; ls -la $HOME/.nvm/')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'getent passwd habeb | cut -d: -f7; echo "---"; cat /etc/wsl.conf 2>&1; echo "---defaultUser check---"; cat /etc/wsl-distribution.conf 2>&1')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh"; nvm install 20 2>&1; nvm alias default 20 2>&1; nvm use default 2>&1')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'which node; node -v; which npm; npm -v; which next 2>&1')
